name: TREUREAL Gebäudeservice GmbH
description: TREUREAL Gebäudeservice GmbH specializes in facility management, offering comprehensive services such as building maintenance and property management to enhance the value and functionality of real estate assets.

name: IFM GmbH IndustrieFacilityManagement
description: IFM Industrie Facility Management GmbH is a specialized service provider offering comprehensive facility management solutions, including maintenance and operational support. With expertise in various technical areas, the company emphasizes flexibility and reliability in optimizing clients' processes.

name: FMCO
description: FMCO is a leading facilities management company in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, specializing in the coordination of services related to buildings, infrastructure, and utilities. They offer a wide range of professional office services and have a highly qualified workforce to support various administrative, commercial, and industrial facilities.

name: City FM
description: City Facilities Management offers expert services that integrate construction, facilities, energy, and asset management, ensuring a proactive approach to support and collaboration. With a dedicated 24/7 Service Desk and a commitment to safety and quality, City FM is well-equipped to meet diverse facility management needs.

name: Embassy Services
description: The company specializes in Integrated Facilities Management (IFM), aiming to maximize value per square foot and enhance operational excellence. Their commitment to future-ready solutions and a focus on renewable energy positions them as a leader in the facility management sector.

name: MAB Facilities Management
description: MAB Facilities Management is a comprehensive facilities service provider in the Middle East and North Africa, specializing in integrated facilities management. They offer a diverse range of services including FM consultancy, engineering maintenance, cleaning, and security, catering to various property types like residential and commercial towers, retail spaces, and data centers.

name: Programmed
description: Programmed is a leading provider of Facility Management services, offering a complete solution for organizations backed by over 70 years of experience and a large specialist workforce. This expertise ensures that clients receive high-quality service tailored to their specific needs.

name: Xpert Facility Management Pvt Ltd
description: Xpert Group is a specialized integrated facilities management organization, offering a wide range of services including Operations & Maintenance, Business Support, and Facilities Services. With a strong emphasis on expertise and certifications, the company effectively manages 25 million square feet across 260 locations, serving over 155 clients.

name: FLEX FACILITY MANAGEMENT LLC
description: Flex Facility Management LLC offers a range of services under soft facility management, including cleaning, housekeeping, and public area maintenance, ensuring that clients' facilities are well-maintained. With a commitment to quality and corporate social responsibility, the company tailors its solutions to meet unique client needs, making it a prominent player in the facility management sector in Dubai.

name: EMCOR Facilities Services
description: EMCOR Facilities Services stands out as a top-tier facilities management company, offering extensive experience and certified expertise. Their scalable model allows them to tailor service delivery to meet the unique needs of various organizations, resulting in high-performing facilities that enhance productivity and reduce costs.
